accept: ready --under ambiguous prefix sub-case (ready.go:173) is fixed in the same change.
Tests cover ambiguous prefix on show, close, update, dep add child/parent, ready --under.
internal/cli/resolve_helpers.go comment is updated to reflect the corrected reading of the spec.
payload.description: Found by code reviewer 2026-05-10. internal/cli/resolve_helpers.go:15-22 and every command using it (show, close, update, ready --under) exit 3 on ambiguous prefix. Code comment acknowledges the spec drift but follows the wrong rule. Spec spec-v2.md universal exit table (lines 515-519): 2 = usage error including ambiguous id prefix; 3 = environment error (not in git, .act missing). Ambiguous prefix is unambiguously a usage error. Public API contract break — agents branching on exit code take the wrong recovery path.
payload.title: id_ambiguous exits 3, spec mandates exit 2
